zh.Studley-Hutton Conyers, Yorkshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭越可爾赫頓 康聶爾斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Mallory於1427年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾赫頓 康聶爾斯時，他的父親William Mallory III Esq.23歲，母親Dyonisia Tempest18歲。他去世於1475年4月在英國越可爾享年48歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mallory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname for an unfortunate person, from Old French maloret, maloré, maleuré ‘ill-fortuned, unlucky’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Mallory was born in 1427, in Hutton Conyers, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Mallory III Esq., was 23 and his mother, Dyonisia Tempest, was 18. He died in April 1475, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Mallory est né en 1427, à Hutton Conyers, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Mallory III Esq., avait 23 ans et sa mère, Dyonisia Tempest, avait 18 ans. Il est décédé en avril 1475, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Mallory(이)가 1427년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 후턴 코니어스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Mallory III Esq.(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Dyonisia Tempest(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1475년 4월 영국 요르크실르에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.
